---
title: "wordclounds"
editor: source
---

```{r}
type = 1
```

{{< include wordclouds.qmd >}}

```{r}
type = 2
```

{{< include wordclouds.qmd >}}

```{r}
type = 3
```

{{< include wordclouds.qmd >}}

```{r}
type = 4
```

{{< include wordclouds.qmd >}}

```{r}
type = 5
```

{{< include wordclouds.qmd >}}

```{r}
type = "total"
```

{{< include wordclouds.qmd >}}
